## Summary

Describe what this change does and why.

## Boundary check

- [ ] Keeps the cross-video evidence-contract focus (not a single-video summarizer)
- [ ] Does not bundle downloaders/transcoders (`yt_dlp`, `ffmpeg`)
- [ ] Does not add a truth-verdict or speaker-correctness feature
- [ ] Uses synthetic/shareable sample data only

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behavior (or explained why not)

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, follow-ups, or open questions.
